title: Online Shopping Return 网购退换货

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.line: Hi, I want to return this jacket. It is too small for me.
lines.trans: 你好，我想退这件夹克。它对我来说太小了。

lines.speaker: Online Service
lines.line: No problem. May I have your order number, please?
lines.trans: 没问题。请提供您的订单号，好吗？

lines.speaker: Online Service
lines.line: Thank you. We can offer a free return within seven days. Would you like a refund or an exchange?
lines.trans: 谢谢。我们可以在七天内提供免费退货。您想要退款还是换货？

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.line: I would like a refund, please. I already bought another one.
lines.trans: 我想要退款。我已经买了另一件了。

lines.speaker: Online Service
lines.line: Alright. Please pack the item and our courier will pick it up tomorrow.
lines.trans: 好的。请把商品打包好，我们的快递员明天会上门取件。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.line: Do I need to pay for the return shipping?
lines.trans: 我需要支付退货运费吗？

lines.speaker: Online Service
lines.line: No, it is free for quality issues or size problems. The refund will be back in three days.
lines.trans: 不需要，因质量问题或尺码问题退货是免费的。退款会在三天内到账。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.line: Great, thank you so much for your help.
lines.trans: 太好了，非常感谢您的帮助。

lines.speaker: Online Service
lines.line: You are welcome. Have a nice day!
lines.trans: 不客气。祝您有愉快的一天！
